text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Sweet, I made it on the board! GG, me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...Uuugh, never mind. I can't pretend to be hyped
about this. I was sooo close... This sucks so bad....

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I knew this might happen, but I really thought I'd
be able to nab first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I must've been holding back somewhere... I didn't
let loose and put myself out there enough.
choice_data_list: Cast away those doubts and nail it next time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ooh, you sure know how to cheer a girlie up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I feel that way too. Next time, I'm gonna win for sure for sure!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right... Let's do this! I'll be the freest on the
track, bar none!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna make all the other racers, the audience, and you recognize me as the GOAT!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You're right! I'll get it next time, no doubt!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
These results made me realize that I have the
potential to win, so all I gotta do now is get my
head in the game!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna work hard so I can proudly say that I
ran my best after every race I finish!
